top_signals.title: Tankers Fear Hormuz Transit as Iran Stops Vessels
top_signals.summary: An empty Malta-flagged, Greece-managed oil products tanker halted at anchor in the Strait of Hormuz near Oman early on Monday as vessel owners and operators grow increasingly wary of attempting to transit the Strait in either direction following the re-escalation of hostilities. The Kavomaleas oil products tanker signaled early on Monday that it is located in the Persian Gulf, at anchor and empty off tip of Oman’s Musandam Peninsula. The tanker’s previous signal broadcast was in the Gulf of Oman early on Sunday local time, according…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Universal and Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' sails to $124.5 million opening
top_signals.summary: Christopher Nolan's "The Odyssey" tallied an estimated $124.5 million at the domestic box office, with IMAX screenings fueling a big haul.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: FBI will no longer investigate ICE confrontations, The New York Times reports
top_signals.summary: The Department of Justice and the Department of Homeland Security have both denied that any change in oversight has taken place.
